title: Tao Te Ching 20
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 20 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 20 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Abandon learning and there will be no sorrow. The distance between 'yes' and 'no' — how great is that?
